---
title: "The Rev. Henry Wilbraham"
---

## The Rev. Henry Wilbraham

**Dates:** (1825-1883)

### Description

Fellow of Trinity College, Cambridge, discoverer of the Gibbs Phenomenon in mathematics, Registrar of the Court of Chancery in Manchester, third cousin to Frances Maria Wilbraham.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan. 3. 1867

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
